description:
gantt_complex sample shows warnings:
- edge_count: expected 33, got 0
- node_count: expected 33, got 0
- path count: expected 11, got 0
- text count: expected 49, got 8

Visual similarity: 29.8%, structural: 71.9%. Task bars and their labels are largely missing. Check src/diagrams/gantt/ against reference.
title: gantt: Missing nodes, edges, paths and text
